zh.Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United: 英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德

zh.Fressingfield, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Storye於1455年出生在英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德時，她的父親John Storye30歲，母親Ann Janes20歲。她和Thomas Godbold至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1503年1月在英國享年48歲。

zh-hans.Fressingfield, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可福雷辛費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Storye于1455年出生在英国素福爾可福雷辛費爾德时，她的父亲John Storye30岁，母亲Ann Janes20岁。她和Thomas Godbold至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1503年1月在英国享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Storye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Storey  .

variants.name: Storey
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Story  .
Perhaps also an altered form of Swiss German Störi, a variant of Storer . Compare Story 3.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Storye was born in 1455, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, her father, John Storye, was 30 and her mother, Ann Janes, was 20. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Thomas Godbold. She died in January 1503, in England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Storye est née en 1455, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Storye, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ann Janes, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Thomas Godbold. Elle est décédée en janvier 1503, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Storye 1455 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Storye 30 und ihre Mutter Ann Janes 20. Sie hatte mit Thomas Godbold mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Januar 1503 im Alter von 48 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Storye è nata il nel 1455 nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Storye, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ann Janes, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Thomas Godbold. Morì nel gennaio 1503, nel England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Fressingfield, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクフレシングフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Margery Storyeが1455年にイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで生まれた時，父John Storyeは30歳，母Ann Janesは20歳であった。彼女はThomas Godboldとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1503年1月にイギリスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Storye(이)가 1455년 영국 수폴크 프레징필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Storye(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Janes(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Godbold(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 1월 영국에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Dennington, Suffolk, England: Dennington, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Storye nasceu em 1455, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Storye, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ann Janes, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Thomas Godbold. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1503, em Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Storye родилась в 1455 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Storye было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Janes, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Thomas Godbold. Она умерла январь 1503 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Storye nació en 1455, en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Storye, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ann Janes, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Thomas Godbold. Murió en enero de 1503, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
